blockingIssues.description: pkg/agent/muninn_proxy.go still enforces the obsolete dedicated validation vault instead of the mission-approved `default` vault, and pkg/agent/muninn_proxy_test.go encodes that outdated rule in regression coverage.

pkg/config/memory.go returns early when a preexisting `tools.mcp.servers.muninn` entry exists, so manual `mcp_muninn_*` calls can still bypass normalization and point at the wrong endpoint instead of the live MCP listener on 8750.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the live Muninn MCP listener on 127.0.0.1:8750 can still reject PicoClaw initialization with `session not found`, so port reachability alone is not valid coexistence proof.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in the `go-memory-worker` procedure that endpoint reachability checks are not sufficient for Muninn coexistence features; workers must capture evidence of a turn where auto recall and a manual `mcp_muninn_*` call both succeed in the same run.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `muninn-recall-resilience-and-mcp-interop` review found the handoff claimed the procedure was followed even though verification only covered tests and port/health checks, not the required coexistence flow.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `go-memory-worker` skill should be updated to prefer a dedicated validation vault instead of `default`.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because mission guidance and AGENTS explicitly require the approved validation vault `default`; the reviewed worker deviated from the documented requirement rather than exposing a guidance bug

rejectedObservations.observation: The committed example config should be updated to document the local 8475/8750 split immediately.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because documentation/example-config changes were not requested here and the knowledge is already captured in `.factory/library/environment.md`; the synthesis only needs to record the mismatch for orchestrator awareness

rejectedObservations.observation: Change branch-wide lint guidance back to raw `golangci-lint run`.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because `.factory/services.yaml` and `.factory/library/environment.md` already document the approved change-scoped lint wrapper for this branch state

rejectedObservations.observation: Apply a services.yaml update for Windows-safe gateway/frontdoor commands now.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected as ambiguous because the concrete safe replacement command shape was not established in the reviewer evidence; it should be proposed with a tested command form before direct application
